User.title: User
User.description: User profile containing name, email, and system authorization role.

id.description: Unique identifier matching Firebase Auth UID.

role.description: System role of the user determining access level.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user was created.

Progress.title: Progress
Progress.description: User's study progress tracking completed theory days and exam/practice attempts.

practiceAttempts.description: Map of completed practice attempt records by day.

userId.description: The user owning this study note.

moduleId.description: The ID of the module (e.g. M0, M1).

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the note was last modified.

SystemSetup.title: SystemSetup
SystemSetup.description: Global system configuration and setup status.

adminSetupComplete.description: Whether the initial admin user has updated their temporary password.

/users/{userId}.description: Collection of user profiles indexed by Firebase Auth UID.

/progress/{userId}.description: User progress data, indexed by User ID.

/notes/{noteId}.description: User personal study notes per module, indexed by note ID.

/system/{documentId}.description: System-wide parameters and global configuration documents.
